citation.description: S1 (37dc-0a2d-8907-442d), S2 (61e6-6a65-f162-47cf), S3 (94c4-c391-3fed-4773), S4 (c9d8-eeb2-67a4-42fd), S5 (85a6-2fea-e2c9-4819), S6 (f978-847d-f874-4f2d), S7 (4c7f-4fd3-11ce-474c) all show status=closed with completion-verifier: PASS signatures.

criteria.criterion: rebar-mcp serves over an optional Streamable-HTTP transport while stdio remains the default and default behavior is byte-unchanged when new flat mcp.* keys are unset.

With auth enabled, the local suite demonstrates 401-without-token (with WWW-Authenticate header carrying RFC 9728 resource_metadata URL), a served PRM document, 200-with-valid-token, 403-insufficient-scope, and rejection of a token whose resource != auth_resource_server_url enforced at the composite.

citation.description: Five test files present: test_mcp_auth.py (static), test_mcp_auth_jwks.py (jwt), test_mcp_auth_introspection.py (introspection), test_mcp_auth_proxy.py (proxy), test_mcp_auth_custom.py (custom); no skips; _mcp_auth.py __all__ exports all five verifier classes.

criteria.criterion: All five verifier modes (static, JWKS/JWT, introspection, trusted-proxy, custom) are selectable via the flat mcp.auth_strategies list / REBAR_MCP_* env vars, each has passing tests, and each populates AccessToken.resource so the composite audience check applies.

Fail-closed startup is tested: unknown auth_strategies entry, auth_enabled with an empty composite, auth-enabled HTTP with no verifier wired, and HTTP with auth disabled and no REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED_HTTP all refuse to start.

New flat config keys and env vars are reflected in MCP_ENV_VARS and server.json (the CI manifest drift gate scripts/check_server_manifest.py passes) and in regenerated docs/mcp-reference.md / docs/env-vars.md.

docs/mcp-auth.md and an ADR document the resource-server-only model, the composite audience choke point, the five verifier modes, the security posture (incl. authenticated!=authorized residual and rate-limiting delegation), the behind-a-proxy deployment, and the three interactive-client connection paths.

citation.description: No test stubs/skips found across the new test files. Multiple child stories (S2-S5) record specific Gerrit change IDs (716, 717, 721, 723, 724) each with Verified+1 on GitHub Actions CI across py3.11/3.12/3.13 + macOS. S6 and S7 completion-verifier PASS at sha 477eabdcf7047aa69061788bed6a29759a874d35.

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test pass on the final integrated branch.
